data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding optional transfer fee payment linkage.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an optional transfer fee payment linkage, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this aspect. The linked use case mentions the need for a transfer fee payment, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or reads that confirm the existence or functionality of this payment linkage. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the optional transfer fee payment linkage.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for transfer fee payment linkage
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the optional transfer fee payment linkage.
